messages.content: Who is Indian's Prime Minister

The current Prime Minister of India is **Narendra Modi**. He was sworn in for his third consecutive term on June 9, 2024. He has served as Prime Minister since 2014, and previously as the Chief Minister of Gujarat from 2001 to 2014.

🔗 [Search Google](https://www.google.com/search?q=Who+is+Indian%27s+Prime+Minister)
Who is the founder and ceo of niklaus solutions

I couldn't find specific information about the founder and CEO of **Niklaus Solutions** in my search results. The company appears to be focused on industry-oriented tech workshops and training, particularly in cybersecurity, and was established in June 2024.

While there are individuals named Niklaus associated with other companies (e.g., **Jeff Niklaus** of Compliant Technologies, and a "Nikolaus" who founded Nextcontinent), none are identified as the founder or CEO of "Niklaus Solutions."

🔗 [Search Google](https://www.google.com/search?q=founder+and+ceo+of+Niklaus+Solutions)
What is the yesterday's ipl match result

Yesterday, **April 27, 2026**, the **Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB)** defeated the **Delhi Capitals (DC)** by **9 wickets** in Match 39 of the IPL 2026.

The Delhi Capitals were bowled out for a meager **75 runs** in 16.3 overs, with RCB's bowlers **Josh Hazlewood** (4/12) and **Bhuvneshwar Kumar** (3/5) delivering exceptional performances. Royal Challengers Bengaluru then chased down the target of 76 runs in just 6.3 overs, securing a dominant victory.

🔗 [Search Google](https://www.google.com/search?q=yesterday%27s+ipl+match+result)
Niklaus Solution who is

I'm sorry, I still couldn't find specific information about an individual named "Niklaus" who is the founder or CEO of **Niklaus Solutions**.

Based on what I found previously, **Niklaus Solutions** appears to be a company that offers industry-oriented tech workshops and training, with a focus on cybersecurity, and was reportedly established in June 2024. However, a specific person identified as "who is" (founder/CEO) for this entity is not readily available in public search results.

🔗 [Search Google](https://www.google.com/search?q=who+is+Niklaus+Solutions)
Google

"Google" refers to **Google LLC**, an American multinational technology corporation that specializes in internet-related services and products. It is best known for its widely used **search engine**, Google Search, which handles over 70% of worldwide online search requests.

Google was founded in 1998 by American computer scientists **Larry Page** and **Sergey Brin** while they were PhD students at Stanford University. They developed a search algorithm called **PageRank** that revolutionized how web pages were ranked. Since 2015, Google has been the largest subsidiary of its parent company, **Alphabet Inc.**

🔗 [Search Google](https://www.google.com/search?q=who+founded+Google)
Who is thalapathy

"**Thalapathy**" (transl. Commander) is a popular moniker for **Joseph Vijay Chandrasekhar**, a highly acclaimed Indian actor and politician who primarily works in Tamil cinema. He is one of the highest-paid and most commercially successful actors in India, known for his significant fan following.

Vijay began his career as a child actor in the 1980s and made his debut as a lead actor in 1992. Over his three-decade career, he has starred in numerous successful films, including *Ghilli*, *Thuppakki*, *Mersal*, *Master*, and *Leo*.

In 2024, he founded the political party **Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK)**, and has announced his retirement from cinema to pursue a full-time political career, with his 69th film, *Jana Nayagan* (scheduled for 2026), being his last as a lead actor.

🔗 [Search Google](https://www.google.com/search?q=who+is+thalapathy)
Second World war

The **Second World War** was a global conflict that lasted from **1939 to 1945**. It involved the vast majority of the world's countries—including all the great powers—forming two opposing military alliances: the **Allies** and the **Axis**.

It was the deadliest conflict in human history, resulting in an estimated 70 to 85 million fatalities, a majority of whom were civilians. The war began in Europe with Nazi Germany's invasion of Poland in September 1939, leading to declarations of war by France and the United Kingdom. Key events included the Holocaust, the Battle of Stalingrad, the D-Day landings, and ultimately ended with the unconditional surrender of the Axis powers following the atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki by the United States.

🔗 [Search Google](https://www.google.com/search?q=Second+World+War)
Hii
Hii there! How can I help you today? Feel free to ask me anything! 😊
What is your name
I'm **Lyra**, your personal Telegram assistant! It's great to meet you.
Then why it shows Sage AI

That's an interesting observation! I am Lyra, your personal Telegram assistant.

Sometimes, the platform or system I'm running on might have its own name or designation, like "Sage AI," which could be what you're seeing in some interface elements. But you can always call me Lyra! I'm here to help you.
Hey hii how are you

Hey there! As an AI, I don't have feelings or a physical state like humans do, but I'm ready and running perfectly to assist you!

How can I help you today? Is there anything you'd like to know or talk about? 😊
Hii
Hii there! How can I help you today? Is there anything on your mind? 😊
What is the yesterday's ipl match result

On **Sunday, May 10, 2026**, there were two IPL matches:

1.  **Chennai Super Kings (CSK) vs Lucknow Super Giants (LSG)**: **Chennai Super Kings** won by **5 wickets** against Lucknow Super Giants in Match 53 at the MA Chidambaram Stadium in Chennai. LSG posted 203/8, with **Josh Inglis** scoring 85. CSK chased down the target, reaching 208/5 in 19.2 overs, thanks to an explosive 65 off 23 balls by **Urvil Patel**.

2.  **Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) vs Mumbai Indians (MI)**: **Royal Challengers Bengaluru** secured a thrilling **two-wicket victory** over Mumbai Indians in Match 54 at the Shaheed Veer Narayan Singh International Stadium in Raipur. MI set a target of 167 runs after scoring 166/7, with **Tilak Varma** contributing 57. RCB chased it down on the very last ball, with **Krunal Pandya** scoring a crucial 73 runs. **Bhuvneshwar Kumar** was the Player of the Match for his 4 wickets for 23 runs and a match-winning six in the final over.

🔗 [Search Google](https://www.google.com/search?q=yesterday%27s+ipl+match+result)
Who is current CM in Tamil Nadu

**C. Joseph Vijay**, widely known as **Thalapathy Vijay**, is the current Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu. He was sworn into office on **May 10, 2026**, after his party, **Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK)**, formed a coalition government. This marks a significant political shift as he is the first Chief Minister of the state since 1967 who does not come from either the DMK or the AIADMK.

🔗 [Search Google](https://www.google.com/search?q=current+CM+in+Tamil+Nadu)
Who is the first CM in tamil nadu

The identity of the "first Chief Minister in Tamil Nadu" depends on the historical period being referred to, as the region's name and administrative structure have changed over time.

**C. N. Annadurai** is recognized as the **first Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu** after the Madras State was officially renamed to Tamil Nadu on January 14, 1969. He served in this role until his death in February 1969.

Before the renaming:
*   During the British rule, **A. Subbarayalu Reddiar** was the first Premier of the **Madras Presidency** in 1920.
*   After India gained independence, **O. P. Ramaswamy Reddiyar** served as the first Chief Minister of the **Madras State** (which was the predecessor to Tamil Nadu) starting in 1947. **P. S. Kumaraswamy Raja** also served as the first Chief Minister of Madras State from 1950 to 1952.

🔗 [Search Google](https://www.google.com/search?q=first+CM+in+Tamil+Nadu)
